heading: Expedited judicial review
label: 6763 Expedited judicial review

children.heading: Civil action
children.label: a Civil action
children.text: Any person or entity subject to a search under this chapter may file a civil action challenging the constitutionality of any provision of this chapter. Notwithstanding any other provision of law, during the full calendar year of, and the two full calendar years following , the district court shall accord such a case a priority in its disposition ahead of all other civil actions except for actions challenging the legality and conditions of confinement.October 21, 1998

children.heading: En banc review
children.label: b En banc review
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, during the full calendar year of, and the two full calendar years following , any appeal from a final order entered by a district court in an action brought under subsection (a) shall be heard promptly by the full Court of Appeals sitting en banc.October 21, 1998
